item.title: 模因星期一🐌 | Meme Monday 🐌
item.description:
一旦被暂停，Ben 将无法发表评论或发布帖子，直到他们的暂停被解除。

取消暂停后，本将能够再次发表评论和发布帖子。

一旦取消发布，ben 的所有帖子都将隐藏起来，只有他们自己可以访问。

如果 ben 没有被暂停，他们仍然可以从他们的仪表板重新发布他们的帖子。

笔记：

感谢您维护 DEV 社区的安全。 以下是您可以用来标记 ben 的操作：

降低 ben 的所有帖子的可见度

报告其他不当行为

Unflagging ben will restore default visibility to their posts. Unflagning ben 将恢复他们帖子的默认可见性。



原文:

Once suspended, ben will not be able to comment or publish posts until their suspension is removed.

Once unsuspended, ben will be able to comment and publish posts again.

Once unpublished, all posts by ben will become hidden and only accessible to themselves.

If ben is not suspended, they can still re-publish their posts from their dashboard.

Note:

Thanks for keeping DEV Community safe. Here is what you can do to flag ben:

Make all posts by ben less visible

ben consistently posts content that violates DEV Community's code of conduct because it is harassing, offensive or spammy.

Report other inappropriate conduct

Unflagging ben will restore default visibility to their posts.
item.author: ben

item.title: 如何将 PayPal 与 HTML、CSS 和 Javascript 集成 | How to Integrate PayPal with HTML, CSS and Javascript
item.description:
您是否曾经访问过一个网站，然后想知道在线交易是如何进行的，无论是购买商品或服务、支付在线课程费用，还是在线捐赠？

我得到了你问题的答案，

在本文中，我们将创建一个捐赠网站，以便用户可以输入他们的捐赠金额并通过 Paypal 进行捐赠。

什么是贝宝？

它成立于1998年，自此成为全球使用最广泛的支付平台之一。

然后，用户可以使用他们的 PayPal 账户购买或接收商品和服务的付款、向其他用户转账或将资金提取到他们关联的银行账户。

它可用于 200 多个市场并支持 100 多种货币，使其成为全球个人和企业的便捷支付选择。

如何将 PayPal 集成到您的产品页面

现在我们知道我们想要实现什么，让我们开始行动吧。 我已将该过程分解为 6 ​​个易于遵循的步骤。 他们是：

  • 访问 PayPal 的开发人员工具以获取您的 API。
  • 设置 PayPal 沙箱环境。
  • 创建和自定义您的 PayPal 按钮。
  • 将您的按钮集成到您当前的文件中。
  • 使用 PayPal 沙箱环境测试集成。
  • 上线并开始接受真实付款。

访问 PayPal 的开发人员工具以获取您的 API

如果您已经拥有一个，只需直接跳转到 PayPal 开发人员工具即可。

要创建 PayPal 帐户，您需要访问 PayPal 网站并按照屏幕上的说明进行注册。 系统会要求您提供一些个人和财务信息，例如您的姓名、电子邮件地址和信用卡详细信息。

完成注册过程后，您将能够登录到您的 PayPal 帐户并访问集成所需的开发人员工具和 API。 使用有效的电子邮件地址很重要，因为您将从 PayPal 收到重要信息和更新。

然后，您可以在 PayPal 控制面板的右上角找到开发人员工具。

设置 PayPal 沙盒环境

它允许您在上线前测试您的集成，这是 PayPal 的一项重要功能，可确保一切按预期工作。

要设置 PayPal 沙箱环境，您需要登录到您的 PayPal 帐户并导航至开发人员仪表板。

从那里，您可以按照屏幕上的说明创建一个新的沙盒帐户。

创建沙盒帐户后，您将能够使用它通过进行测试付款来测试您的集成。 您可以与真实账户同时使用沙盒账户。

创建您的贝宝按钮

此步骤涉及使用 PayPal SDK 创建一个 Paypal 按钮

<script src="https://www.paypal.com/sdk/js?client-id=YOUR_CLIENT_ID" ></script>

添加将包含在 HTML 文件中的 Paypal 按钮。

添加一个将获取金额的输入字段。

 <!DOCTYPE html> <html lang="en"> <head> <script src="./script.js" defer></script> <title> Paypal Integration with Javascript </title> <script src="https://www.paypal.com/sdk/js?client-id=YOUR_CLIENT_ID" ></script> </head> <body> <h1>Hello world, This is PayPal Integration with Javascript</h1> <input id="donate-amount" type="Enter Amount"> <div id="paypal-button-container"> </div> </body> </html>

创建 Javascript 代码以调用 Paypal 按钮

创建一个script.js文件并添加以下函数。

 function initPayPalButton() { paypal .Buttons({ style: { shape: "rect", color: "gold", layout: "vertical", label: "paypal", }, createOrder: function (data, actions) { const userInput = document.getElementById("donate-amount").value; const paypalAmount = parseFloat(userInput) ; return actions.order.create({ purchase_units: [ { amount: { currency_code: "USD", value: paypalAmount } }, ], }); }, } initPayPalButton();

上面的函数创建了Paypal实例并创建了一个订单实例，它接受输入值并将其映射到筹款网站中要扣除的值

添加批准消息

当 Paypal 交易评估为真时，向用户发送消息。

 onApprove: function (data, actions) { return actions.order.capture().then(function (orderData) { // Full available details console.log( "Capture result", orderData, JSON.stringify(orderData, null, 2) ); // Show a success message within this page, for example: const element = document.getElementById("paypal-button-container"); element.innerHTML = ""; element.innerHTML = "<h3>Thank you for your payment!</h3>"; // Or go to another URL: actions.redirect('thank_you.html'); }); }, onError: function (err) { console.log(err); },

下面的代码是整个 Javascript 实现指南。

 function initPayPalButton() { paypal .Buttons({ style: { shape: "rect", color: "gold", layout: "vertical", label: "paypal", }, createOrder: function (data, actions) { const userInput = document.getElementById("donate-amount").value; const paypalAmount = parseFloat(userInput) / 100; return actions.order.create({ purchase_units: [ { amount: { currency_code: "USD", value: paypalAmount } }, ], }); }, onApprove: function (data, actions) { return actions.order.capture().then(function (orderData) { // Full available details console.log( "Capture result", orderData, JSON.stringify(orderData, null, 2) ); // Show a success message within this page, for example: const element = document.getElementById("paypal-button-container"); element.innerHTML = ""; element.innerHTML = "<h3>Thank you for your payment!</h3>"; // Or go to another URL: actions.redirect('thank_you.html'); }); }, onError: function (err) { console.log(err); }, }) .render("#paypal-button-container"); } initPayPalButton();

希望本文对您有所帮助，发表评论或点赞，

这是源代码github.com/Evans-mutuku/PayPal-Intergra ...

文章最初发表于https://melbite.com/melbite/Integrating-Paypal-with-javascript

编码愉快！



原文:

Have you ever visited a website and then wondered how transactions take place online, either in purchasing goods, or services, paying for an online course, or even donating online?

I got the answer to your question,

In this article, we are going to create a donation website such that a user can input their donation amount and donate through Paypal.

What is Paypal?

PayPal is an online payment system that allows individuals and businesses to send and receive payments electronically. It was founded in 1998 and has since become one of the most widely used payment platforms in the world.

PayPal enables users to create accounts and link them to their bank accounts, credit cards, or debit cards. Users can then use their PayPal accounts to make purchases or receive payments for goods and services, transfer funds to other users, or withdraw funds to their linked bank accounts.

PayPal is popular for its ease of use, security features, and wide acceptance across many online merchants and services. It is available in over 200 markets and supports more than 100 currencies, making it a convenient payment option for people and businesses worldwide.

How to Integrate PayPal into Your Product Pages

Now that we know what we want to achieve, let’s get into action. I have broken down the process into 6 easy-to-follow steps. They are:

  • Access PayPal’s developer tools to get your APIs.
  • Set up a PayPal sandbox environment.
  • Create and customize your PayPal button.
  • Integrate your button into your current files.
  • Test the integration using the PayPal sandbox environment.
  • Go live and start accepting real payments.

Accessing PayPal’s Developer Tools to Get Your APIs

If you already have one, just hop straight to the PayPal developer tools.

To create a PayPal account, you'll need to visit the PayPal website and follow the on-screen instructions to sign up. You'll be asked to provide some personal and financial information, such as your name, email address, and credit card details.

Once you've completed the sign-up process, you'll be able to log in to your PayPal account and access the developer tools and APIs needed for integration. It's important to use a valid email address as you will receive important information and updates from PayPal.

Then, you can find the developer tools at the top right of your PayPal dashboard.

Setting Up a PayPal Sandbox Environment

The Sandbox environment is a testing environment that mimics the live PayPal environment. It allows you to test your integration before going live, which is a great feature from PayPal to ensure that everything is working as expected.

To set up a PayPal sandbox environment, you'll need to log in to your PayPal account and navigate to the developer dashboard.

From there, you can create a new sandbox account by following the on-screen instructions.

Once the sandbox account is created, you'll be able to use it to test your integration by making test payments. You can use the sandbox account in parallel with your live account.

Creating Your PayPal Button

This step involves creating a Paypal button using the PayPal SDK

<script src="https://www.paypal.com/sdk/js?client-id=YOUR_CLIENT_ID" ></script>

Add the Paypal button that will be included in the HTML file.

Add an input field that will take the amount.

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head> <script src="./script.js" defer></script> <title> Paypal Integration with Javascript </title> <script src="https://www.paypal.com/sdk/js?client-id=YOUR_CLIENT_ID" ></script>
</head>
<body> <h1>Hello world, This is PayPal Integration with Javascript</h1> <input id="donate-amount" type="Enter Amount"> <div id="paypal-button-container"> </div>
</body>
</html>

Creating Javascript Code to invoke the Paypal buttons

Create a script.js file and add the following function.

function initPayPalButton() { paypal .Buttons({ style: { shape: "rect", color: "gold", layout: "vertical", label: "paypal", }, createOrder: function (data, actions) { const userInput = document.getElementById("donate-amount").value; const paypalAmount = parseFloat(userInput) ; return actions.order.create({ purchase_units: [ { amount: { currency_code: "USD", value: paypalAmount } }, ], }); },
}
initPayPalButton();

The above function creates Paypal instance and create an order instance that takes the input value and maps it to the value to be deducted in the fundraise website

Adding an approve message

When the Paypal transaction evaluates to true, send a message to a user.

onApprove: function (data, actions) { return actions.order.capture().then(function (orderData) { // Full available details console.log( "Capture result", orderData, JSON.stringify(orderData, null, 2) ); // Show a success message within this page, for example: const element = document.getElementById("paypal-button-container"); element.innerHTML = ""; element.innerHTML = "<h3>Thank you for your payment!</h3>"; // Or go to another URL: actions.redirect('thank_you.html'); }); }, onError: function (err) { console.log(err); },

The below code is the whole Javascript implementation guide.

function initPayPalButton() { paypal .Buttons({ style: { shape: "rect", color: "gold", layout: "vertical", label: "paypal", }, createOrder: function (data, actions) { const userInput = document.getElementById("donate-amount").value; const paypalAmount = parseFloat(userInput) / 100; return actions.order.create({ purchase_units: [ { amount: { currency_code: "USD", value: paypalAmount } }, ], }); }, onApprove: function (data, actions) { return actions.order.capture().then(function (orderData) { // Full available details console.log( "Capture result", orderData, JSON.stringify(orderData, null, 2) ); // Show a success message within this page, for example: const element = document.getElementById("paypal-button-container"); element.innerHTML = ""; element.innerHTML = "<h3>Thank you for your payment!</h3>"; // Or go to another URL: actions.redirect('thank_you.html'); }); }, onError: function (err) { console.log(err); }, }) .render("#paypal-button-container");
}
initPayPalButton();

Hope this article helps, Leave a comment or a like,

This is the source code github.com/Evans-mutuku/PayPal-Intergra…

Article originally published at https://melbite.com/melbite/Integrating-Paypal-with-javascript

Happy coding!
item.author: evansifyke

item.title: GitLive 增加了对更多分支策略的支持，包括 GitFlow | GitLive adds support for more branching strategies including GitFlow
item.description:
您现在可以指定哪些分支不是功能分支并在 GitLive 中应得到特殊处理，添加对具有多个特殊分支的分支策略的支持，例如 GitFlow 及其主分支、开发分支和发布分支。

在为VS Code或JetBrains安装 GitLive 后，GitLive 边栏将出现在您的 IDE 中，在当前分支之前列出所有作者及其分支。

特殊分支，如默认分支，将显示在树的顶部，而不是在最后一次提交到该分支的作者下方。

您可以在 GitLive 的设置中使用正则表达式指定多个特殊分支：

默认表达式如下，应该可以满足绝大多数分支策略的需求，但您可以随意为自己的设置自定义表达式。

main|master|trunk|dev|develop|qa|test|release[-/].*

例如，您可以删除 |release[-/].* 如果您仍然希望发布分支出现在作者下，或者如果您的团队总是创建前缀为 feature/ 的功能分支，您可以将表达式简化为以下内容：

(?!feature\/).*

最后，值得记住的是，存储库视图只显示活动的分支（在当前分支之前），无论您为特殊分支指定了什么表达式。

就这些了，感谢阅读并让我们知道您在评论中的想法！

一旦暂停，gitlive 将无法评论或发布帖子，直到他们的暂停被删除。

一旦解除暂停，gitlive 将能够再次发表评论和发布帖子。

一旦取消发布，gitlive 的所有帖子都将隐藏起来，只有他们自己可以访问。

如果 gitlive 没有暂停，他们仍然可以从他们的仪表板重新发布他们的帖子。

笔记：

感谢您维护 DEV 社区的安全。 以下是您可以用来标记 gitlive 的操作：

使 gitlive 的所有帖子不那么显眼

报告其他不当行为

取消标记 gitlive 将恢复他们帖子的默认可见性。



原文:

You can now specify which branches are not feature branches and deserve special treatment in GitLive, adding support for branching strategies with multiple special branches such as GitFlow with its master, develop and release branches.

After installing GitLive for VS Code or JetBrains, the GitLive sidebar will appear in your IDE, listing all the authors and their branches ahead of your current branch.

Special branches, like the default branch, will show at the top of the tree, instead of under the author of the last commit to the branch.

You can specify multiple special branches using a regular expression in GitLive’s settings:

The default expression is as follows and should cater to the vast majority of branching strategies out there but feel free to customize the expression for your own setup.

main|master|trunk|dev|develop|qa|test|release[-/].*

For example, you could remove the |release[-/].* if you still wanted release branches to appear under the author, or if your team always creates feature branches prefixed feature/ you could simplify the expression to the following:

(?!feature\/).*

Finally, it’s worth remembering that the repository view only shows branches that are active (ahead of your current branch) no matter what expression you have specified for special branches.

💡 Note for regex ninjas: Your expression is implicitly surrounded by ^ and $ so it needs to match the complete branch name.

That's it for now, thanks for reading and let us know what you think in the comments!

Beatrice Egumandi - Mar 30

Once suspended, gitlive will not be able to comment or publish posts until their suspension is removed.

Once unsuspended, gitlive will be able to comment and publish posts again.

Once unpublished, all posts by gitlive will become hidden and only accessible to themselves.

If gitlive is not suspended, they can still re-publish their posts from their dashboard.

Note:

Thanks for keeping DEV Community safe. Here is what you can do to flag gitlive:

Make all posts by gitlive less visible

gitlive consistently posts content that violates DEV Community's code of conduct because it is harassing, offensive or spammy.

Report other inappropriate conduct

Unflagging gitlive will restore default visibility to their posts.
item.author: stecagnieszka

item.title: 改变你的 CSS 游戏：收藏这 10 个 CSS 生成器 | Transform Your CSS Game: Bookmark These 10 CSS Generators
item.description:
设计和开发现代化的响应式网站可能是一项具有挑战性的任务。 但是，使用正确的工具，您可以轻松简化工作流程并创建令人惊叹的网页设计。 在这篇文章中，我们将向您介绍 10 个 CSS 生成器，每个 web 设计师和前端开发人员都应该在他们的工具包中。

使用 CSS 网格生成器轻松构建复杂的 CSS 网格布局。 使用这个功能强大且直观的基于网格的布局工具添加和删除列和行、调整间隙以及对齐内容。
弹性盒生成器

创建响应式和流畅的 flexbox 布局从未如此直观。 从各种动画中进行选择，并调整持续时间、延迟和其他设置以创建完美的效果。
一组视觉上吸引人的 CSS 模式，您可以将其用作项目的背景。 浏览图库、自定义模式并复制生成的代码。
花式边框半径生成器

使用 Fancy Border Radius Generator 设计独特而复杂的边界半径形状。 通过调整值和预览结果来创建椭圆形和不规则形状，然后只需复制 CSS 代码即可。
过滤器生成器

通过生成模糊、亮度、对比度、灰度等 CSS 滤镜，实现令人惊叹的视觉效果。 自定义过滤器值以创建完美效果并复制为您的项目生成的代码。
一个简单的 CSS 箭头生成器，允许您创建具有可自定义属性（如大小、颜色和位置）的类似工具提示的箭头。 预览您的设计，然后复制生成的代码。
盒子阴影生成器

使用 Box Shadow Generator 为您的元素制作完美的阴影。 自定义阴影的颜色、模糊、散布和位置，以创建专业且精美的外观。
使用 CSS 动画创建的一组简单、优雅的加载微调器。 浏览画廊，选择一个微调器，然后复制代码以将时尚的加载器添加到您的 Web 项目中。
剪辑

不是微软的 Clippy（虽然有一个 JS 库）。 一个有趣且易于使用的工具，用于生成 CSS 剪辑路径形状。 选择一个预定义的形状或通过调整画布上的点来创建您自己的形状，然后将生成的代码复制到您的项目中。

bennettfeely.com/clippy/ bennettfeely.com/clippy/



原文:

Designing and developing modern, responsive websites can be a challenging task. However, with the right tools, you can easily streamline your workflow and create stunning web designs. In this article, we will introduce you to 10 CSS generators every web designer and frontend developer should have in their toolkit.

CSS Grid Generator

Build complex CSS Grid layouts with ease using the CSS Grid Generator. Add and remove columns and rows, adjust gaps, and align content with this powerful and intuitive grid-based layout tool.
cssgrid-generator.netlify.app/

Flexbox Generator

Creating responsive and fluid flexbox layouts has never been more intuitive. The Flexbox Generator allows you to adjust alignment, direction, wrapping, and other properties, all while viewing the changes in real-time.
the-echoplex.net/flexyboxes/

CSS Animation Generator (Animesta)

The CSS Animation Generator offers a comprehensive library of pre-built animations that you can customize to fit your needs. Choose from various animations, and tweak the duration, delay, and other settings to create the perfect effect.
animista.net/

CSS3 Patterns Gallery

A collection of visually appealing CSS patterns that you can use as backgrounds in your projects. Browse the gallery, customize the patterns, and copy the generated code.
leaverou.github.io/css3patterns/

Fancy Border Radius Generator

Design unique and complex border-radius shapes with the Fancy Border Radius Generator. Create elliptical and irregular shapes by adjusting values and previewing the result, then simply copy the CSS code.
9elements.github.io/fancy-border-radius/

Filters Generator

Achieve stunning visual effects by generating CSS filters such as blur, brightness, contrast, grayscale, and more. Customize filter values to create the perfect effect and copy the generated code for your project.
www.cssfiltergenerator.com/

CSS Arrow Please

A simple CSS arrow generator that allows you to create tooltip-like arrows with customizable properties such as size, color, and position. Preview your design and then copy the generated code.
cssarrowplease.com/

Box Shadow Generator

Craft the perfect shadow for your elements with the Box Shadow Generator. Customize the shadow's color, blur, spread, and position to create a professional and polished look.
html-css-js.com/css/generator/box-shado…

SpinKit

A collection of simple, elegant loading spinners created using CSS animations. Browse the gallery, select a spinner, and copy the code to add a stylish loader to your web project.
tobiasahlin.com/spinkit/

Clippy

Not Microsofts Clippy (although there is a JS library for that). A fun and easy-to-use tool for generating CSS clip-path shapes. Select a predefined shape or create your own by adjusting points on the canvas, then copy the generated code to your project.

bennettfeely.com/clippy/
item.author: nialljoemaher

item.title: Python 请求 üzerinde sertifika kullanımı | Python requests üzerinde sertifika kullanımı
item.description:
发表于 4 月 4 日

一旦暂停，aciklab 将无法发表评论或发布帖子，直到他们的暂停被删除。

一旦解除暂停，aciklab 将能够再次发表评论和发布帖子。

一旦取消发布，aciklab 的所有帖子都将隐藏起来，只有他们自己可以访问。

如果 aciklab 没有被暂停，他们仍然可以从他们的仪表板重新发布他们的帖子。

笔记：

感谢您维护 DEV 社区的安全。 您可以通过以下方式标记 aciklab：

降低 aciklab 的所有帖子的可见度

报告其他不当行为

取消标记 aciklab 将恢复其帖子的默认可见性。



原文:

Ali Orhun Akkirman for Açıklab

Posted on Apr 4

   

Python'ın request kütüphanesinde çalışırken özellikle self-signed sertifikalar ile sorunlar yaşandığında muhtemelen sistem geneline eklediğiniz bir sertifikanın Python request kütüphanesinde kullanılmadığını görebilirsiniz.

Bunun örneği için aşağıdaki gibi bir Python kodu yazarak başlayabiliriz.

import requests response = requests.get(url="https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Zonguldak")

Bu kod sonucu aşağıdaki gibi bir hata alınmaktadır.

requests.exceptions.SSLError: HTTPSConnectionPool(host='en.wikipedia.org', port=443): Max retries exceeded with url: /wiki/Zonguldak (Caused by SSLError(SSLCertVerificationError(1, '[SSL: CERTIFICATE_VERIFY_FAILED] certificate verify failed: self-signed certificate in certificate chain (_ssl.c:997)')))

Bu hatadan kurtulmanın bir yolu aşağıdaki satırda "verify = False" parametresinin eklenmesi olarak internette çözüm bulunabilmektedir. Fakat bu adımla birlikte sertifika kontrolünü kontrol edilmemesini sağlamaktasınız.

response = requests.get(url="https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Zonguldak",verify = False)

Bu nedenle Debian tabanlı sistemlerde bu sorunun en güzel çözümü aşağıdaki gibi uygulanabilmektedir. RPM tabanlı sistemlerde ise ca-certificates.crt yerine ca-bundle.crt kullanılmaktadır.

import requests
import os os.environ['REQUESTS_CA_BUNDLE'] = os.path.join('/etc/ssl/certs/','ca-certificates.crt') response = requests.get(url="https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Zonguldak")

Bu şekilde çalıştırıldığında artık istenilen sunucuya SSL ile bağlantı kurabilirsiniz. Tabi ki sistem genelinde ilgili sertifikanın eklenmiş olması gerekeceğini unutmayalım.

Pawel Suchanecki - Feb 25

  1. 它具有简单的语法和庞大的开发人员社区，因此它是一种适合初学者的语言。

item.title: 具有 2 个相同示例的 GraphQL VS API Graph | GraphQL VS API Graph with 2 same examples
item.description:
艾哈迈德·阿卜杜拉·埃比拉勒

发表于 4 月 4 日

我们将贯穿两个做同样事情的例子，第一个使用 GraphQL，第二个使用 api-graph。

这是一个不使用任何数据库的简单示例，所有数据都存储在内存中。 这两个示例有一个包含 id 和 name 的 warriors 数据数组，然后我们将尝试提取这两个字段之一，但提取两个库 GraphQL 和 api-graph。

这个例子来自digitalocean

 import express from "express"; import cors from "cors"; import { graphqlHTTP } from "express-graphql"; import { makeExecutableSchema } from "@graphql-tools/schema"; const app = express(); const port = 4000; // In-memory data store const data = { warriors: [ { id: "001", name: "Ahmed" }, { id: "002", name: "Abdalla" }, ], }; // Schema const typeDefs = ` type Warrior { id: ID! name: String! } type Query { warriors: [Warrior] } `; // Resolver for warriors const resolvers = { Query: { warriors: (obj, args, context) => context.warriors, }, }; const executableSchema = makeExecutableSchema({ typeDefs, resolvers, }); app.use(cors()); app.use(express.json()); app.use(express.urlencoded({ extended: true })); // Entrypoint app.use( "/graphql", graphqlHTTP({ schema: executableSchema, context: data, graphiql: true, }) ); app.listen(port, () => { console.log(`Running a server at http://localhost:${port}`); });

差异

  • 一旦暂停，ahmedsudani 将无法发表评论或发布帖子，直到他们的暂停被取消。

解除暂停后，ahmedsudani 将能够再次发表评论和发布帖子。

一旦取消发布，ahmedsudani 的所有帖子都将隐藏起来，只有他们自己可以访问。

如果 ahmedsudani 没有被暂停，他们仍然可以从他们的仪表板重新发布他们的帖子。

笔记：

感谢您维护 DEV 社区的安全。 以下是标记 ahmedsudani 的方法：

降低 ahmedsudani 的所有帖子的可见度

报告其他不当行为

取消标记 ahmedsudani 将恢复其帖子的默认可见性。



原文:

Ahmed Abdalla Elbilal

Posted on Apr 4

   

GraphQL is all about asking the API for what exactly I need rather than it gives me the whole data, but introduced new concepts like resolvers and mutations and changes the whole way you use to write your APIs.

api-graph is also all about asking the API for what exactly I require rather than it gives me the complete data, but without changing anything that you use to write.

We will go throughout to two examples that do the same thing, the first one uses GraphQL and the second uses api-graph.

It's a simple example that don't use any database, all the data are stored in memory. The two examples have an array of warriors data that includes id and name then we will try to extract one of those two fields but the two libraries GraphQL and api-graph.

GraphQL example

this example is from digitalocean

import express from "express";
import cors from "cors";
import { graphqlHTTP } from "express-graphql";
import { makeExecutableSchema } from "@graphql-tools/schema";

const app = express();
const port = 4000;

// In-memory data store
const data = {
  warriors: [
    { id: "001", name: "Ahmed" },
    { id: "002", name: "Abdalla" },
  ],
};

// Schema
const typeDefs = `
type Warrior {
  id: ID!
  name: String!
}

type Query {
  warriors: [Warrior]
}
`;

// Resolver for warriors
const resolvers = {
  Query: {
    warriors: (obj, args, context) => context.warriors,
  },
};

const executableSchema = makeExecutableSchema({
  typeDefs,
  resolvers,
});

app.use(cors());
app.use(express.json());
app.use(express.urlencoded({ extended: true }));

// Entrypoint
app.use(
  "/graphql",
  graphqlHTTP({
    schema: executableSchema,
    context: data,
    graphiql: true,
  })
);

app.listen(port, () => {
  console.log(`Running a server at http://localhost:${port}`);
});

api-graph example 

import express from "express";
import cors from "cors";
import apiGraph from "api-graph";

const app = express();
const port = 4000;

// In-memory data store
const warriors = [
  { id: "001", name: "Ahmed" },
  { id: "002", name: "Abdalla" },
];

app.use(cors());
app.use(express.json());
app.use(express.urlencoded({ extended: true }));
app.use(apiGraph({ extract: "query" }));
app.post("/api-graph", (req, res) => res.json({ warriors }));
app.listen(port, () => {
  console.log(`Running a server at http://localhost:${port}`);
});

Differences

  • api-graph saves the way you use to write apis and GraphQL uses resolvers, mutations and changes every thing.
  • The memory cost of import in GraphQL is height, while in api it's low.

  • GraphQL More writing while api-graph less writing
  • GraphQL { warriors { id } } api-graph { warriors : [ { id } ] } GraphQL use graph query language, but api-graph uses string JSON without values.
  • GraphQL has a playground that you can send request from it in the development process, which means it has documents for API, api-graph don't have.

Mario Prasetya M. - Mar 11

Adam Nathaniel Davis - Mar 26

item.title: 如何使用 .NET 的内置缓存机制来提高 Web 应用程序的性能 | How to use .NET's built-in caching mechanism to improve the performance of your web applications
item.description:
巴文·莫拉迪亚

发表于 4 月 4 日

缓存是提高 Web 应用程序性能的关键技术。 通过在内存中缓存频繁访问的数据，您可以减少应用程序需要执行的数据库查询和其他昂贵操作的数量，从而实现更快的响应时间和更好的可伸缩性。

在.NET中，缓存机制内置于框架中，易于实现和定制。 以下是使用 .NET 的缓存功能来提高应用程序性能的一些技巧：

要使用 MemoryCache 类，您可以在应用程序中创建它的新实例，并使用 Add() 和 Get() 方法分别从缓存中添加和检索数据。

 var cache = MemoryCache.Default; var key = "myCachedData"; var data = cache.Get(key) as List<MyData>; if (data == null) { // If the data isn't in the cache, query the database and store the results in the cache data = db.Query<MyData>("SELECT * FROM MyData").ToList(); cache.Add(key, data, DateTimeOffset.Now.AddMinutes(10)); }

在此示例中，我们使用 MemoryCache 类将数据库查询的结果缓存 10 分钟。 如果数据已经在缓存中，我们使用 Get() 方法检索它。 如果没有，我们查询数据库并使用 Add() 方法将结果存储在缓存中。

缓存在用于频繁执行的昂贵操作时最有效。 例如，如果您有一个显示产品列表的页面并且该列表很少更改，您可以缓存产品数据以提高页面的性能。

当你向缓存中添加数据时，你可以指定一个过期时间，以确保数据在一定时间后自动从缓存中移除。 根据数据更改的频率以及拥有最新信息的重要性来设置合理的到期时间非常重要。

与任何性能优化一样，监控缓存策略的性能以确保它确实提高了应用程序的性能非常重要。 您可以使用 PerfView 等工具来衡量缓存对应用程序 CPU 和内存使用的影响。

缓存是一种提高网络应用程序性能的强大技术，.NET 内置的缓存机制使其易于实现和定制。 通过对昂贵的操作使用缓存并设置合理的过期时间，您可以减少数据库和其他资源的负载，从而实现更快的响应时间和更好的可伸缩性。

一旦暂停，bhavin9920 将无法发表评论或发布帖子，直到他们的暂停被解除。

解除暂停后，bhavin9920 将能够再次发表评论和发布帖子。

一旦取消发布，bhavin9920 的所有帖子都将隐藏起来，只有他们自己可以访问。

如果 bhavin9920 没有被暂停，他们仍然可以从他们的仪表板重新发布他们的帖子。

笔记：

感谢您维护 DEV 社区的安全。 您可以通过以下方式标记 bhavin9920：

降低 bhavin9920 的所有帖子的可见度

报告其他不当行为

取消标记 bhavin9920 将恢复其帖子的默认可见性。



原文:

Bhavin Moradiya

Posted on Apr 4

   

Caching is a crucial technique for improving the performance of web applications. By caching frequently accessed data in memory, you can reduce the number of database queries and other expensive operations your application needs to perform, leading to faster response times and better scalability.

In .NET, the caching mechanism is built into the framework, making it easy to implement and customize. Here are some tips for using .NET's caching features to improve your application's performance:

1.Use the MemoryCache class : .NET's built-in caching mechanism is based on the MemoryCache class, which allows you to store data in memory for quick access. To use the MemoryCache class, you can create a new instance of it in your application and use the Add() and Get() methods to add and retrieve data from the cache, respectively.

var cache = MemoryCache.Default;
var key = "myCachedData";
var data = cache.Get(key) as List<MyData>;

if (data == null)
{
    // If the data isn't in the cache, query the database and store the results in the cache
    data = db.Query<MyData>("SELECT * FROM MyData").ToList();
    cache.Add(key, data, DateTimeOffset.Now.AddMinutes(10));
}

In this example, we're using the MemoryCache class to cache the results of a database query for 10 minutes. If the data is already in the cache, we retrieve it using the Get() method. If not, we query the database and store the results in the cache using the Add() method.

2.Use caching for expensive operations :
Caching is most effective when used for expensive operations that are performed frequently. For example, if you have a page that displays a list of products and the list rarely changes, you could cache the product data to improve the page's performance.

3.Set a reasonable expiration time :
When you add data to the cache, you can specify an expiration time to ensure that the data is automatically removed from the cache after a certain period. It's important to set a reasonable expiration time based on how frequently the data changes and how important it is to have the most up-to-date information.

4.Monitor cache performance :
Like any performance optimization, it's important to monitor the performance of your caching strategy to ensure that it's actually improving your application's performance. You can use tools like PerfView to measure the impact of caching on your application's CPU and memory usage.

Caching is a powerful technique for improving the performance of web applications, and .NET's built-in caching mechanism makes it easy to implement and customize. By using caching for expensive operations and setting reasonable expiration times, you can reduce the load on your database and other resources, leading to faster response times and better scalability.
